name: dev-project-launcher
title: Dev Project Launcher
description: Manage and launch your dev projects — open in PhpStorm, start DDEV/Docker Compose, open terminal, launch in browser.
author: philipp

commands.name: list-projects
commands.title: List Projects
commands.subtitle: Dev Project Launcher
commands.description: Browse all your dev projects and launch actions

preferences.name: phpstormPath
preferences.title: PhpStorm CLI Path
preferences.description: Path to the PhpStorm CLI launcher (e.g. /usr/local/bin/phpstorm or the Toolbox path)

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal App
preferences.description: Which terminal to open project folders in

preferences.name: dockerComposePath
preferences.title: Docker Compose Path
preferences.description: Path to the docker compose binary (v2: 'docker compose', v1: 'docker-compose')
